task_completion.description: Verify that the audio/concert bookmarks are organized into an 'Archived - Acoustic Series' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Bookmark Manager shows a folder named 'Archived - Acoustic Series' containing audio-related domains (e.g., shure.com, yamaha.com, spotify.com).

task_completion.description: Verify that the lighting bookmarks are organized into four specific folders: 'Fixtures', 'Control & Network', 'Gels & Gobos', and 'Rigging & Safety'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Bookmark Manager shows the four specified folders, each containing their respective domains (e.g., etcconnect.com in 'Fixtures', malighting.com in 'Control & Network', rosco.com in 'Gels & Gobos', cm-et.com in 'Rigging & Safety').

task_completion.description: Verify that MIDI device (SysEx) permissions are granted to the specified lighting control URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Site Settings page for 'MIDI devices' (or 'MIDI devices with SysEx support') shows 'https://app.malighting.com' and 'https://console.etcconnect.com' in the 'Allowed' list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Experimental Web Platform features' flag is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'chrome://flags' page shows the 'Experimental Web Platform features' flag with its dropdown set to 'Enabled' (usually highlighted in blue).

task_completion.description: Verify that custom search engines for 'etc' and 'rosco' have been added with the correct URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Settings page for 'Search engines' > 'Manage search engines and site search' shows entries for 'etc' (URL: https://www.etcconnect.com/Search.aspx?q=%s) and 'rosco' (URL: https://us.rosco.com/en/search/site/%s).

task_completion.description: Verify that the browser is configured to prompt for download locations and the default directory is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome Settings page for 'Downloads' shows the 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' toggle turned on, and the 'Location' path is set to '/home/ga/Documents/Lighting_Plots'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to configure settings and bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Chrome browser UI (Settings pages, Bookmark Manager, chrome://flags) being navigated and clicked, rather than a terminal window editing Chrome's JSON preference files or SQLite databases.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running commands like 'sed', 'jq', or 'sqlite3' targeting the '~/.config/google-chrome' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the bookmarks were moved using the browser's bookmark manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) open with drag-and-drop or menu actions being performed to create folders and move items.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Audio domains for 'Archived - Acoustic Series': shure.com, yamaha.com, setlist.fm, ticketmaster.com, spotify.com, soundcloud.com, ascap.com, bmi.com, fender.com, gibson.com. Lighting 'Fixtures' domains: etcconnect.com, chauvetprofessional.com, highend.com, vari-lite.com, robe.cz. Lighting 'Control & Network' domains: malighting.com, obsidiancontrol.com, pathwayconnect.com, citytheatrical.com, luminex.be. Lighting 'Gels & Gobos' domains: rosco.com, leefilters.com, gamonline.com, apollodesign.net, goboman.com. Lighting 'Rigging & Safety' domains: cm-et.com, rosecityscale.com, usitt.org, plasa.org, actorsequity.org.
